hero.sub: Your Life In The Heart Of Nature
hero.desc: Born from a bold vision — to transform the way we live by reuniting people with the land. Agricultural compounds that merge modern homes with fertile farmland.

about.title: About
about.desc: La Granja is a development company redefining the way people live — creating agricultural compounds that unite modern homes with fertile farmland, offering families a healthier, more balanced life closer to nature.
about.b1: Communities designed around a simple idea: a home that gives back — residents enjoy contemporary villas while benefiting from productive land that can generate income.
about.b2: A lifestyle as sustainable as it is rewarding — every home surrounded by fertile farmland.
about.b3: Lifestyle creators offering spaces where people live better today while building value for the future.
about.b4: Agriculture, sustainability, and modern life together — just an hour from the city.

vm.title: Vision
vm.vtext: To inspire a lifestyle movement where every home is more than just a shelter — it is a source of wellness, sustainability, and value. Vibrant communities surrounded by fertile soil, where every home offers comfort, every acre holds potential, and every investment grows.
vm.mtext: We create communities that reconnect people with nature, foster sustainable practices, and provide spaces where life and investment grow hand in hand. Our agricultural compounds allow families to live surrounded by nature — all while knowing their home and land remain valuable, long-term assets.

story.title: Our
story.p1: It all started with a simple dream: to create a life where modern living meets nature, where comfort and sustainability go hand in hand.
story.p2: The founders saw the need for a place that blends the peace of the countryside with the convenience of being close to the city.
story.p3: They envisioned vibrant communities surrounded by fertile soil, where every home offers comfort, every acre holds potential, and every investment grows.
story.p4: La Granja was born to turn this vision into reality — agriculture, sustainability, and modern life — just an hour away.

v.title: Community
v.text: Life is richer when shared. Our developments foster strong connections between neighbors where families can grow together and create a culture of belonging.

v.title: Integrity
v.text: We are guided by honesty, transparency, and trust. Every project reflects our commitment to doing the right thing for our residents, partners, and environment.

v.title: Sustainability
v.text: We believe in living in harmony with the earth. Every La Granja community is designed with eco-friendly practices that protect natural resources.

v.title: Prosperity
v.text: We measure success not only by financial growth, but by the quality of life our communities bring — rewarding, meaningful, and naturally abundant.

v.title: Wellness
v.text: True wealth begins with well-being. Our compounds nurture healthier lifestyles from fresh air and natural produce to open spaces that promote balance.

v.title: Innovation
v.text: We embrace new ideas that blend technology, design, and agriculture to create smarter, more efficient communities connected to the land.

villa.p1: At La Granja, a home should be more than walls and a roof — a source of wellness, purpose, and prosperity. That belief gave birth to our concept: agricultural compounds that merge modern living with productive farmland.
villa.p2: Each development offers residents a contemporary villa designed for comfort and elegance, paired with fertile land that can be cultivated for fresh produce or managed for profit.
villa.p3: A lifestyle that is both rewarding and sustainable — where families enjoy the peace of nature, farm-to-table living, and the financial value of land ownership.

f.title: Reconnect with Nature
f.text: Without sacrificing modern conveniences — the best of both worlds in one community.

f.title: Promote Healthier Living
f.text: Through open spaces, fresh air, and access to natural produce grown on your own land.

f.title: Encourage Sustainability
f.text: Eco-friendly design combined with productive land for a future-proof lifestyle investment.

f.title: Value Beyond Ownership
f.text: A home that generates income and offers long-term stability — your land, your legacy.

management.title: Management
management.desc: The visionary founders behind La Granja — united by expertise in construction and agriculture.

ahmed.name: Ahmed Galal
points: Experienced architecture engineer and founder of El Fath Construction Company, established in 2008.
Pivotal role in the construction of the 2022 FIFA World Cup Stadiums in Qatar.
Actively involved in major state projects since 2008, including the high-speed train project in Suez.
His vision shaped La Granja's integration of modern infrastructure with sustainable living.

mohamed.name: Mohamed Ragab
points: Agricultural developer and owner of Elite for Agricultural Development.
Working in agricultural investment and development since 2020.
Projects include El Alamein, New Valley, and the West Assiut project.
His expertise integrates modern living with fertile land for a sustainable future.

cards.title: Rooted in Growth & Balance
cards.text: La Granja redefines investment by merging financial prosperity with environmental integrity. Each element crafted for enduring value.

cards.title: Sustainable Profitability
cards.text: Eco-efficient infrastructure reduces operational costs and enhances long-term returns.

cards.title: Nature-Driven ROI
cards.text: Every aspect of La Granja's environment contributes to its ecological desirability and market value.

cards.title: Location & Growth
cards.text: Strategically positioned for expansion, offering both convenience and exclusivity.

cards.title: Legacy Investment
cards.text: More than an investment — a statement of enduring purpose and timeless prestige.

cards.title: Lifestyle as Wealth
cards.text: The greatest return comes from the life you live — measured in health, balance, and well-being.

projects.title: Our
projects.desc: Three distinctive projects, one unwavering vision — communities where modern living and sustainable agriculture exist side by side.

rw.label: Project 01
rw.tagline: Create Your Farm — Fayoum Asyut Road
rw.desc: Rayan West is not just another agricultural project — it stands out as a one-of-a-kind investment that goes beyond a simple villa or piece of land.

features.title: Modern Living Meets Productive Farmland
features.text: A complete lifestyle experience combining contemporary residential comfort with fertile farmland, ensuring steady income.

features.title: Prime Location
features.text: Situated along the Fayoum Asyut Road, only an hour from Cairo — perfect balance of tranquility and city access.

features.title: Architectural Elegance
features.text: Andalusian-inspired villas with natural ventilation domes ensuring cool, fresh interiors throughout the year.

features.title: Each Farm Includes
features.text: Productive greenhouses · 30 Barhi palm trees · Land ready for intercropping.

rh.label: Project 02
rh.title: Rayan Hills
rh.sub: A new horizon for life & investment
rh.text: Rayan Hills will embrace the same philosophy that defines La Granja — combining elegant modern villas, fertile land, and a lifestyle rooted in nature.

gh.label: Project 03
gh.title: Ghernata
gh.sub: A new horizon for life & investment
gh.text: Ghernata will carry forward the La Granja vision — sophisticated architecture, productive agricultural land, and a community lifestyle that is both rewarding and sustainable.

egypt.title: Egypt's Agricultural
egypt.intro: Egypt is shaping a new agricultural era — and La Granja is at the heart of it.
egypt.p1: Egypt is investing heavily in agriculture to secure food supply and boost exports. The FY 2025/2026 plan allocates EGP 17.5 billion to modernize farming.
egypt.p2: The strategy includes reclaiming land to reach 12 million feddans by 2030, using smart irrigation, high-yield crops, and major reclamation projects.
egypt.p3: Egypt's Vision 2030 emphasizes technology-driven sustainable farming through AI, modern irrigation, and climate-adaptive practices.
egypt.c2title: La Granja: Investing in Egypt's Agricultural Tomorrow
egypt.p4: As Egypt embraces a modern, sustainable agricultural future, La Granja stands at the forefront — combining contemporary living with productive farmland.
egypt.p5: Just outside Cairo, La Granja offers rural tranquility with city accessibility, while certified green contracts ensure secure, long-term investment.

sustainability.title: Sustainability as a
sustainability.p1: At La Granja, sustainability is not an option — it is the foundation of how we live and build. Caring for the environment and caring for ourselves are one and the same.
sustainability.p2: From eco-friendly infrastructure to fertile land that produces natural food, sustainability is woven into daily life. Residents breathe cleaner air, eat fresher produce, and enjoy spaces designed to promote well-being.

features.title: Eco-Friendly Infrastructure
features.text: Every structure built with green principles, minimizing environmental impact.

features.title: Productive Farmland
features.text: Fertile land producing natural, fresh food and connecting residents to the earth.

features.title: Smart Irrigation
features.text: Modern water management systems that conserve resources and optimize productivity.

features.title: Green Communities
features.text: Designed to help families live closer to nature and conserve resources for future generations.

partners.title: Our
partners.desc: La Granja is proud to work alongside Egypt's leading organizations in agriculture and construction.

sections.title: About Sun Gate
sections.text: La Granja partners with Sun Gate, one of Egypt's leading names in food production, trading, and export. With over 17 years of expertise, Sun Gate delivers premium food products to local and international markets.

sections.title: Sun Gate's Vision
sections.text: To become the leading and preferred export company with quality, service, and values as the highest priorities.

sections.title: From Farm to Market
sections.text: La Granja supplies Sun Gate with fresh, high-quality crops. Sun Gate processes and distributes across local and global markets — a seamless farm-to-product supply chain.

sections.title: About El Fath
sections.text: La Granja partners with El Fath Construction Company, one of Egypt's leading construction companies. Founded in 2008, El Fath has been a prominent player for over a decade.

sections.title: Track Record of Excellence
sections.text: El Fath has worked on significant state projects including the high-speed train project in Suez and numerous government initiatives.

sections.title: Building the Future Together
sections.text: El Fath's construction expertise ensures every La Granja development meets the highest standards of quality, durability, and architectural integrity.

footer.tagline: Your Life In The Heart Of Nature
footer.about: Creating agricultural communities that reunite people with the land — where modern living and sustainable farming exist in perfect harmony.
